text:
### §3.4 Surgical Benefits
The following surgical procedures are covered at **60% plan / 40% member** after the deductible is satisfied, when medically necessary and prior-authorized:

- Appendectomy
- Cholecystectomy (gallbladder removal)
- Knee and hip arthroplasty
- Bariatric surgery (gastric bypass and sleeve gastrectomy)
- Hernia repair
- Cataract surgery
